---
title: "Projects"
---

Below are selected projects from my graduate research at Emory University. Each project addresses a real public health or clinical problem using modern statistical and machine learning methods.

<div class="section-label"><span>Graduate Projects</span></div>

<div class="projects-grid">

<div class="project-card">
<h3>HUMID Atlanta: High-Resolution Meteorological Exposure Modeling</h3>
<p>Integrated multi-source spatiotemporal datasets across 5 Atlanta metro counties (2014&ndash;2018), processing over 120,000 daily records at 1km resolution. Built a hybrid Bayesian geostatistical downscaler coupled with Random Forest to bias-correct temperature exposures using personal weather station observations as ground truth &mdash; enabling more precise environmental health studies.</p>
<div>
<span class="tag">R</span>
<span class="tag">Bayesian Geostatistics</span>
<span class="tag">Spatial Analysis</span>
<span class="tag">Random Forest</span>
</div>
<br>
<a class="btn-link" href="https://github.com/xian703/humid-atlanta" target="_blank">
<i class="fab fa-github"></i> View on GitHub
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<h3>ED Benchmark: Hospitalization Outcome Analysis Using EHR Data</h3>
<p>Built reproducible data pipelines for extracting, mapping, and temporally aligning ICD codes across patient encounters in a large EHR dataset. Applied logistic regression and generalized estimating equations (GEE) to identify preadmission diagnosis patterns associated with adverse inpatient outcomes &mdash; supporting evidence-based clinical decision-making.</p>
<div>
<span class="tag">R</span>
<span class="tag">GEE</span>
<span class="tag">EHR Data</span>
<span class="tag">Logistic Regression</span>
</div>
<br>
<a class="btn-link" href="https://github.com/xian703/ed-benchmark" target="_blank">
<i class="fab fa-github"></i> View on GitHub
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<h3>Co-occurring Token Framework for ICU Risk Monitoring &amp; ARDS Prediction</h3>
<p>Contributed to a deep learning framework for predicting ARDS risk in ICU patients using longitudinal EHR data. Engineered temporal features from multi-site ICU datasets, implemented sequence construction and representation learning components in PyTorch, and evaluated model interpretability through token attention patterns and stability diagnostics.</p>
<div>
<span class="tag">Python</span>
<span class="tag">PyTorch</span>
<span class="tag">ICU / EHR</span>
<span class="tag">Deep Learning</span>
</div>
<br>
<a class="btn-link" href="https://github.com/xian703/icu-ards" target="_blank">
<i class="fab fa-github"></i> View on GitHub
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<h3>Weather &amp; Wildfire Prediction Using BP Neural Network and ARMA</h3>
<p>Collected over 280,000 climate records from Chongqing, China and built BP neural networks alongside ARIMA time-series models in Python and MATLAB to forecast weather and wildfire risk. Achieved over 90% weather prediction accuracy and successfully flagged the 2022 wildfire risk events using meteorological fire indices (FFMC, DMC, ISI, BUI).</p>
<div>
<span class="tag">Python</span>
<span class="tag">MATLAB</span>
<span class="tag">Neural Networks</span>
<span class="tag">Time Series</span>
</div>
<br>
<a class="btn-link" href="https://github.com/xian703/wildfire-prediction" target="_blank">
<i class="fab fa-github"></i> View on GitHub
</a>
</div>

</div>
